Glucose Science Game Suite

App launch shared state objects + routing
Pip AI chat routing: view → service → cloud/on-device backends

Parent PIN + Apple sign-in gating flow
Profile picker selects profile and loads game state into main app
App design system consumed across views
Family setup wizard flow (manager → steps → finishSetup)
Recipe model: Recipe + PantryItem + GardenRecipes consumed by list/card
Glucose Goddess nutrition thread (Inchauspe science across game systems)
